routes.title: SpendThrone - The Kingdom of Weird Stuff
routes.metaDescription: Discover the weirdest, most viral products on Earth. Extreme tech, luxury items, and WTF technology for the modern age. A curated collection of bizarre innovation.

ogTags.title: SpendThrone - The Kingdom of Weird Stuff
ogTags.description: The curated kingdom of the weirdest, most viral products on Earth. WTF-level technology for the modern age.

twitterTags.title: SpendThrone - The Kingdom of Weird Stuff
twitterTags.description: The ultimate collection of viral, weird, and extreme products. WTF-level technology for the modern age.
